text.title: Rafflesia
text.desc: Dawanghua, known as the world's largest flower. The color is colorful and has a pungent odor.

text.title: African egret flower
text.desc: Growing up in the deserts of South Africa, the flowers smell bad and can attract carrion beetles.

text.title: Voodoo
text.desc: The flowers are stinky like carrion, and the leaves are like leaves, like dragons or snakes entrenched in the flames.

text.title: Giant konjac
text.desc: Giant konjac can release the smell of filth, some odors have a unique urinary smell, some smell like carrion, and one has a butyric acid smell. Therefore, it is often called "corpse smell".

text.title: One hundred years old
text.desc: One hundred years old has only two leaves in his life. The average life expectancy can reach hundreds of years, and some of them can even reach 2000, so this is the name.

text.title: Egret flower
text.desc: The egret flower is shaped like a winged egret, very beautiful. Due to excessive human picking, it is already an endangered plant.

text.title: Nepenthes
text.desc: Nepenthes has a pitching cage with a lid on the mouth of the cage, hence the name. If the insect slips into the bottle, it will be drowned by the liquid secreted from the bottom of the bottle.

text.title: Tiger must
text.desc: The tiger must look like a tiger's face, hence the name "Tiger Bear."

text.title: Cape of Good Hope
text.desc: Cape of Good Hope is known as the world's top 90 species of carnivorous plants. It is known as the "king of hunting" in the plant world.

text.title: Venus Flytrap
text.desc: Venus Flytrap has 3 bristles. Once it is touched more than 3 times in 20 seconds, the leaves will close in one second and capture the prey.

text.title: Monkey face dragon
text.desc: Because of the monkey face, it is called "monkey face orchid".

text.title: Italian red door
text.desc: Because the shape of the whole flower is like a man wearing a straw hat, also known as the Italian man Lan.

text.title: Lip flower
text.desc: A flower named after its shape resembling sexy and seductive lips.
